title: Incept AP Coverage Dashboard
subtitle: Where the closed learning loop works today, by AP subject.

loop_stages.diagnose: Wrong answers → content hash → AP standard tags via the loops_question_tag map. Requires CED file + tagger coverage.
loop_stages.decide: Recommend the next test from current signal (nextTest.js). Subject-agnostic; works wherever the bucket logic has data to read.
loop_stages.act: Build Knowledge → incept-hole-filler generates a tailored remediation course, pushes it to TimeBack, auto-enrolls the student. Requires the subject to be registered in the hole-filler.
loop_stages.retest: Student takes the next test → FRQ grader scores the rubric → bucket re-evaluates. Requires a calibrated FRQ grader for the subject.

status_legend.closed: Fully automated end-to-end; no human in the loop required.
status_legend.partial: Wired up but with a known caveat (e.g., grader uses generic fallback prompt, low student validation count).
status_legend.open: Not wired up or known broken; requires manual intervention or has no path.

contradictions.title: AP Calculus BC has enrolled students but no FRQ grader
contradictions.details: 2 students sit the May 11 exam. The slug is not registered in incept-hole-filler/src/hole_filler/subjects.py, and engine/regrade/subject_registry.py raises KeyError on it. MCQ ingestion + tagger work via the CED file, but Build Knowledge cannot generate a tailored course and FRQ sections cannot be auto-graded.
contradictions.remediation: Either (a) add Calc BC to both registries before May 11, or (b) flag the 2 affected students for manual remediation.

contradictions.title: Three subjects with enrolled students are not in the hole-filler registry
contradictions.details: When students in these subjects hit the Build Knowledge action bucket, no remediation course can be auto-generated. Enrollment is small (1+1+1 = 3 students), so the operational impact is limited; coverage gap is real if enrollment grows.
contradictions.remediation: Add the three slugs to incept-hole-filler/src/hole_filler/subjects.py with appropriate roster_labels, oneroster_subjects, and grades entries. CED files exist for Calc AB and Stats; Music Theory needs a CED first.

contradictions.title: AP Music Theory has no CED file
contradictions.details: data/ced_ap_*.json covers 16 of 17 enrolled subjects — Music Theory is missing. The tagger has no standards to map wrong answers to, so the Diagnose stage is open for this subject regardless of hole-filler registration.
contradictions.remediation: Author a CED-style standards file for AP Music Theory (skills + topic taxonomy) and place it in timeback-loops/data/.
